review_notes: Layer: light_overlays. Engine-blended door-open exterior light per environment_notes ('teal_0->cyan_0 streak from street entrance ... separate engine overlay, bake none of them'). Localized to the street door leaf (native x537-569,y99-218, bar_mid.svg) plus a short floor spill (~40px) toward the room, not a room-crossing beam. Sparse teal_0 dither with a cyan_0 seam at the door glass itself, max density 0.28. v001 first pass fanned the light ~150px across the midground, over the TV and several tables — rebuilt short and localized. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts. Verified by compositing over env_bar_bg_far_v001+env_bar_bg_mid_v001 at 3x.
